qa_pair.question: Which command starts Bardo's browser-approved account connection before client setup?
Which command prepares the local .bardo workspace layer before play?
Which MCP transport does Bardo publish for this release?
What is the official MCP Registry server name for Bardo?
What npm package identifier is used for Bardo MCP?
Which tool should an agent call first to inspect readiness and guardrails?
Which Bardo tool records explicit player corrections at the highest canon precedence?
Where does Bardo keep prepared local campaign artifacts?
Does Bardo upload campaign truth to a hosted gameplay service in this release?
What access is required to use Bardo after installation?
qa_pair.answer: An active Bardo Pro subscription or the 3-day trial
